chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1142 of 2018 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 31.01.2024 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, Advocate for Petitioner Syed Naimat Ali Shah, associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for Respondents No.8 to 13 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for petitioner submits that report of Assistant Commissioner, Taluka Ghotki has been submitted, he has gone through the same and if this petition is disposed of in the light of said report, he would be satisfied. Learned counsel appearing for the other side have recorded no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the light of observations / findings recording by Assistant Commissioner, Taluka Ghotki in his report dated 29.11.2023. Judge Judge ARBROHI
